name: PDFShift
description: PDFShift — REST API for converting HTML pages or URLs to PDF with CSS media support and custom options.

seo.title: PDFShift — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: PDFShift: PDFShift — REST API for converting HTML pages or URLs to PDF with CSS media support and custom options.

when_to_use: HTML or URL to PDF conversion with CSS media print support
Generating server-side PDF reports from React or Vue pages
Custom header, footer, and watermark in PDF via API
Batch HTML-to-PDF for document generation pipelines
Headless browser PDF rendering without managing Puppeteer

pros: Handles modern CSS and JS-heavy pages well
Clean REST API and code samples
European hosting for GDPR peace of mind
cons: Not ideal for complex CSS Paged Media layouts
Rate limits defined per second, not per month
No bulk-pricing negotiation below big tiers
review.verdict: Excellent modern HTML-to-PDF API — hits the sweet spot for most apps, lose to PrinceXML on print layouts.
review.best_for: SaaS apps converting dynamic web pages to PDF with modern CSS/JS.
review.not_for: Print-shop layouts needing CSS Paged Media — use PrinceXML.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
